series_metadata.series_title: Work Opportunity Tax Credit Program (WOTC) Denials
series_metadata.series_description: Applications for Work Opportunity Tax Credit Program (WOTC)Tax Credits submitted by employers or employer representatives to obtain a federal tax credit which were denied after the review process. These applications may be paper or electronic format

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 1 year from denial date, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 1 year from denial date, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
